feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Supply Chain Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Supply Chain Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: STO PO creation through BAPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

           I'm creating STO PO through BAPI_PO_CREATE1, while executing this I'm facing ME 083 Enter supplier error. I have maintained correct document type, suppling plant and other details whatever we maintain during manual creation of STO PO. Can you suggest any solution?

entry.title: Handling LiveCache in a heterogeneous migration scenario
entry.content:
Hello All,

As part of the heterogeneous migration process, we are required to export both the SCM instance and the liveCache.

Requesting your guidance on executing the report /SAPAPO/OM_LC_DOWNLOAD_UPLOAD in the production client, along with the detailed steps involved.

Additionally, please provide the prerequisite checks that need to be carried out prior to the SCM system (both scm and livecache) migration to HANA.

Source details
SCM Version:
SAP SCM 7.0 - 21 (01/2019) - SAP SCM 7.0
EHP2 FOR SAP SCM 7.0 - EHP2 FOR SAP SCM 7.0 - 23 (02/2019) - EHP2 FOR SAP SCM 7.0
SAP NETWEAVER - SAP EHP3 FOR 7.0 - 24 (01/2019)- SAP EHP3 FOR SAP NETWEAVER 7.0

SQL DB: Microsoft SQL Server 2017
MAXDB database :7.9.10.07
OS: Windows Server 2019

Note:
The operating system is changing from Windows to Linux.
Only the SCM database will be changed in the target system i.e ( from sql server to  HANA db).
LiveCache will continue to use the same database (MaxDB) in the target environment.

Regards
Appuru

entry.title: I have all correct entry maintained in MM50 but still the same message as no materials selected
entry.content: While I am trying to extend the material master view using the MM50 , I am adding all the materials correct plant correct Material type all is okay still its giving message as no materials selected

entry.title: How to provide masking option for badge number entry in SAP DM POD?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have come across the requirement where in Badge number entry should be masked with special character like * or #. As part of standard OOTB configuration we don't see any option. Could you please suggest any other option?

Regard's

Uday.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Stock Room Management - Fiori Applications compatibility
entry.content:
Good day, 

I am not able to find relevant SAP information on a list of Fiori Apps that remain compatible from LE-WM move to Stock room Management on S/4HANA.

Are there any reference documents or KBA that may list any known issues and workarounds? 

 

Regards

Pat

entry.title: WBS element is not getting updated in the AUFK table Sales order gets updated
entry.content:
Hi Guys do you know why WBS element is not getting updated in the AUFK table Sales order gets updated , so if account assignment is Sales order then it gets updated in AUFK but if the account assignment is WBS element it is not showing in AUFK table , do you know if any configuration we need to do .

For other order type eg PS04  we can see the element WBS in AUFK

entry.title: How to obtain Packing Time Stamp on Outbound Delivery Status DPC in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi

I am currently using SAP EWM module on SAP S/4 HANA Release 1809, and we observe that in the Monitor, when we click on Outbound Delivery,on the Status tab all statuses are displayed like Time Stamp of picking completed, time stamp of Good Issue , excpet Pack Time DPC , how can I obtain Pack time DPC Stamp in a simplest way. 

The meaning of pack time should be when all the products in the outbound delivery positions are packed in a Shipping HU and packing of all products is completed. 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP LSMW (Legacy System Migration Workbench) Recording method full guide
entry.content:
LSMW (Legacy System Migration Workbench)

Function of LSMW

LSMW is essential for data migration and data updating. It's responsible for the automatic processing of transactional data and Master Data creation.

LSMW provides four different methods for upload:

  • Direct input method
  • Batch input recording
  • BAPI
  • IDOC 

This document helps us to learn about Batch input recording method.

In the SAP home screen type LSMW , then press enter to move next screen

Click on the Create Entry button

 

  1. Enter Project / Subproject / Object details,
  2. Then click on the continue button

Click on the Execute button (Shortcut F8)

Select the line item and click on execute button (F8)

Individual steps will open display mode, manually switch to change mode

  1. Select on Batch Input Recording
  2. Select on Recordings overview

Click on the Create on button

  1. Enter the Recording name and Description
  2. Click on the Continue button

  1. Enter the Transaction code, which is you want to record
  2. Click on the Continue button

  1. Enter the required inputs to create the transaction
  2. Click on the save button

Click on the Default All button, to get the field name

  1. Click on the Save button
  2. Click on the Back button

Click on the back button

  1. Click on F4 button to get recent record name.
  2. Click on the save button.
  3. Click on the back button

The system automatically highlighted the next steps

Click on the object overview

Choose Table

Select from the 3rd row and copy the data

Open the Excel sheet and paste the data into sheet 1

Paste the same data in sheet 2, and delete the description column. Then change CHAR to C

Copy the data from sheet 1 and paste to sheet 3 in Transpose mode, then enter data

Copy data from row number 1 and 5 and paste into sheet 4, then Align left

Open the Text document, copy the data from sheet 4, and paste it into text format.

Keep ready the text file to upload.

Select step 2 and click on execute

Click on change mode

  1. Click on the create button
  2. Enter source structure and Description
  3. Click on the continue button

Click on the save button

Select step 3, then click on the execute button

Click on the Change mode

  1. Keep the cursor on the source name
  2. Click on the table maintenance button

Copy the data from Excel file sheet 2, paste and press enter

Click on the Save button, then click on the back button

  1. Click on the Save button
  2. Click on the back button

  1. Select step 4
  2. Click on execute button

Click on change mode

  1. Click on the save button
  2. Click on the back button

  1. Select step 5
  2. Click on the execute button

Click on change mode

  1. Keep the cursor on Fields
  2. Select the Extras option
  3. Select the Auto Field mapping option

Click on the continue button.

Click on Accept Proposal until auto field mapping complete

Click on the continue button

  1. Click on the save button
  2. Click on the back button

  1. Select step 6 (Auto select by system)
  2. Click on the execute button

No action this step, so click on the back button

  1. Select step 7
  2. Click on the execute button

Click on change mode

  1. Keep the cursor on Legacy data
  2. Click on the create button

  1. Choose the file local desk and enter name for file
  2. Select the Tabulator option (Our text file space in Tabulator mode)
  3. Choose File Names at start of file (Our file Field name is first row)

  1. Click on the save button
  2. Click on the back button

  1. Select step 8
  2. Click on the execute button

Click on change mode

  1. Click on the save button
  2. Click on the back button

  1. Select step 9
  2. Click on the execute button

Click on the execute button (F8)

Click on the Allow button

We can see the number records loaded, then click on the back button

  1. Select step 10.
  2. Click on the execute button (F8)

Click on the continue button

Click on the back down

  1. Select step 11
  2. Click on the execute button

Click on the execute button (F8)

Click on the back button (F3)

  1. Select step 12
  2. Click on the execute button (F8)

Click on the continue button

Click on the back button (F3)

  1. Select step 13
  2. Click on the execute button

  1. Enable Keep batch input folder check box
  2. Click on the execute button

Click on the continue button

  1. Select step 14
  2. Click on the execute button (F8)

  1. Select the line item
  2. Click on the process option
  3. Choose the Display errors only option (If loaded bulk data, choose background option)
  4. Enable check as per shown
  5. Click on process button

If data was loaded successfully, this message will be displayed.

Click on the session overview button

You can see the result to loaded vs Successful

If you load further more new data’s keep the file ready in text format and execute the transaction form step 7 in same project.                        

 

Thanks

Senthilkumar T

entry.title: how to configure a Business Partner (BP) to act as both a customer and a supplier
entry.content: In my project i need to setup a new BP who should serve as a customer and supplier. What are the basic configurations to be done for this? We already have BP'S as a separate customers and vendors. Now a single BP needed to take the roles of both customer and vendor.

entry.title: ePPDS activation logical system in S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Recently we activated ePPDS module in our SAP version S/4HANA 2023 SP1 HANA

After activation we face issue with ECC integration of basic elements. Screenshots below. 

CURTO_CREATE We are getting 

PDS integration into owm system not possible Screenshot attache

 

CFM1/2

It causes block of material dependent objects, it block integration of all elements from ECC to ePPDS as it immediately creates empty models, once it’s connected with 2 different log systems we are able to run integration

Should we continue with ECC <-> ePPDS integration with 2 separate logical systems or should ePPDS be activated on one logical system with ECC only? Is there any check mark or configuration document for one logical system integration? 

Thank you in advance

Best Regards,

Nilesh

entry.title: SPED output type error
entry.content:
Hi,

      I have configured SPED output type for inbound delivery creation once PGI for STO PO posted. During this I'm facing one issue. Error is showing for SPED output type as below 1 pic. When I check in SM58, its showing screen output without connection to user is showing refer below screenshot. Kindly provide solution for how to resolve this.

VL02N error

SM58 error

entry.title: what's the frequency count of each part
entry.content: Is there a report or tile that will show me the frequency count for each part? We need proof for auditor that we are keeping up with the system generated cycle counts using ABC.

entry.title: Different delivery types DIG DOG not possible in one document in MIGO
entry.content:
Hi

We have created Work Order in IW31 for Refurbishment Process. Then While Posting Goods Issue in MIGO with 261 Movement Type and Getting error.

Different delivery types DIG DOG not possible in one document.

entry.title: How to calculate tax for delivery cost condition type in PO
entry.content:
Hi,

     We have scenario like In PO material cost is 120, then Packing cost is 20 and Tax is 18%. In PO Tax is only calculating on Material cost 120 = 21.6 its not calculating for Packing Cost 20. So total amount of Po is 161.6 but it should be 165.2. Kindly provide a solution. I have attached the Pricing procedure.

entry.title: Purchasing BOM
entry.content: We have a situation where we need to place a PO for 2 items, but only on one item would be picked up by MRP. Normally on the PO we would indicate the second item as a text information, but the supplier doesn't accept it. We need to make sure that both items would be on the PO. Is there any functionality in where you can connect items?

entry.title: SAP MM Cerificate selection
entry.content: I’ve completed my SAP MM training using learning materials, but I’m unsure which certification to pursue since SAP has introduced many updates recently. Could someone please guide me on selecting the right SAP certification exam for SAP MM?

entry.title: Issue in Refurbishment Process with EWM while Goods Issue for Damage material
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing the refurbishment process using SAP EWM and have encountered an issue related to delivery types during Goods Issue.

Process Overview:

  • Split valuation is activated for the material.

  • A Purchase Order was created for the NEW valuation type material, and the stock has been successfully uploaded.

  • The NEW valuation type material was issued to production.

  • During the production process, the material got damaged, and we now need to issue the DAMAGED valuation type material back to the warehouse/store.

  • A maintenance plan order was created using IW31.

Issue Faced:

When attempting to perform a Goods Issue for the order, the system displays the following error

"Different delivery types DIG DOG not possible in one document"

Request for Support:

Could you please advise:

  • If there is any mistake in the process mentioned above?

  • What is the correct way to issue damaged material from production to warehouse/store under the DAMAGED valuation type?

  • Are there any specific configurations (e.g., movement type to delivery type mapping, valuation type handling in EWM) that need to be checked or updated to resolve this issue?

 

Thanks You

entry.title: Supplier Return Process in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Why is there a need to create a purchasing info record before a supplier return process can be carried out in SAP S/4HANA public cloud (as this is a prerequisite). If this isn't done, the system would be able to generate an outbound delivery ID which would be used for the picking and GI processes.

Can anyone help out with this.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to restrict Q4 and B6 stock type at WPT level
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I have created a warehouse process type in which I wanted to allow only F2 stock type to move and restrict Q4 & B6 stock type. Is there any way to achieve this by standard or custom.

Thanks’,

Vinod

entry.title: SAP UK training center
entry.content:
Hi SAP community,

Good morning.

Has anyone done SAP training with SAP UK recently? I want to enroll for SAP Materials management consultancy training but i am not sure which center would be suitable for me. I would prefer class room to virtual training session.

Your help with recommendation with the training center will be greatly appreciated.
